notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Kyle Karros. Carson Benge to 2nd. Carson Benge advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: TJ Rumfield plunked
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield hit by pitch. Hunter Goodman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, second baseman Tyler Freeman to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Brett Baty scores. Mark Vientos out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Tyler Freeman to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Ronny Mauricio out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Tyler Freeman to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.
